blended.narrative: Le Massif is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 115 ft. Looking ahead, 35 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 20" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
